name: KB HOME
business: KB Home builds a variety of new homes, including attached and detached single-family residential homes, townhomes and condominiums, designed primarily for first-time and first move-up, as well as second move-up and active adult, homebuyers. Its financial services operations offer various insurance products to its homebuyers and provide title services in certain markets, and it also provides mortgage banking services indirectly through an unconsolidated joint venture.

exposures.sentence: We build a variety of new homes, including attached and detached single-family residential homes, townhomes and condominiums, designed primarily for first-time and first move-up, as well as second move-up and active adult, homebuyers.

Our financial services operations, which accounted for the remaining .4% of our total revenues in 2025, offer various insurance products to our homebuyers in the markets where we build homes and provide title services in certain of those markets.
In 2025, all our homes built in California were solar homes.

catalysts.event: Repeal of Section 45L tax credit for homes delivered after June 30, 2026, effective for homes delivered after that date.
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, H.R.1, the One Big Beautiful Bill Act ( OBBBA ) repealed the Section 45L credit for homes delivered after June 30, 2026.

catalysts.event: Plan to bring mix of homes delivered closer to historical average (60-70% Built to Order) in 2026.
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, with a more normalized supply chain and meaningful improvement in our average build times since the 2023 second quarter, we intend to bring our mix of homes delivered closer to our historical average.

catalysts.event: Plan to selectively expand application of IBHS wildfire resilience standards to other new-home communities in 2026.
catalysts.sentence: We intend to selectively expand our application of IBHS standards to other new-home communities in 2026 and beyond.
